1. Remove the emojis from Our Services section, use layer icons

![][image1]

2. On the work page, we want to keep all our portfolios there. Don't list ventures there  
3. Replace “Call now” with “Book A Call”. Use the link below.   
   ![][image2]  
     
   Cal-com \- [https://cal.com/thesign/discovery-call](http://cal.com/thesign/discovery-call)  
     
4. Contact page amra eirokom calendar ekta option rakhte chaitasi, amdr Cal .com link use koiren, ei jinis ta try korte paren. Here is an example.  
   ![][image3]  
     
5. Website first open howar por je part ashe 360 Solution For Your Brand etate ei animation ta use korte paren   
   \[[https://www.reactbits.dev/text-animations/shiny-text](https://www.reactbits.dev/text-animations/shiny-text)\]  
     
6. Our Trusted Partners section amra ei animation use korte chai   
   \[[https://www.reactbits.dev/animations/logo-loop](https://www.reactbits.dev/animations/logo-loop)\]  
     
7. Website surute 360 Solution For Your Brand pichone je animation ase , we can try this  
   \[[https://www.reactbits.dev/backgrounds/light-rays](https://www.reactbits.dev/backgrounds/light-rays)\]  
     
8. Not needed you can remove it   
   ![][image4]  
     
9. Also remove these emojis from Team page, use layer icons  
   ![][image5]  
     
10. Replace the central logo with 360°. Place our venture logos within the orbits and animate them with a rotation effect  set the inner orbits to rotate faster than the outer orbits  
    ![][image6]      
      
    like this one![][image7]  
      
      
      
11. Add gallery view of all work,  static and videos.![][image8]
